Localization.Description: The execution of a suspicious command via a scheduled task was detected. Some tools can execute commands remotely on a host via scheduled tasks, such as atexec (impacket)

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} ran a suspicious command via Task Scheduler on host {event_src.host}
The user {object.account.name} ran a suspicious command via Task Scheduler on host {event_src.host}
